{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Fyrellis
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fyrellis]] is a court alchemist on [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
